minting_now.name: Collectr
minting_now.description:
Monthly Art on Base - Discover our stunning editions published monthly to bring awareness to the global community. With crosschain accessibility and credit card support, we make it easy for anyone to begin their own global art collecting journey.

Created with love by [Kusari](https://kusari.org).

minting_now.name: MASTER PROMPT
minting_now.description: Master Prompt captures a surreal and intimate moment between reality and reflection. A woman in a vintage, Renaissance-inspired gown gently touches a gilded mirror, where a different version of herself gazes back—soft, luminous, and emotionally distant. Warm golden light collides with deep teal shad

minting_now.name: Transylvania II
minting_now.description: Some collections blend Transylvanian traditions with modern art, such as digital art inspired by Romanian painting or traditional, ornate 3D painted eggs (inspired by Romanian tradition).

minting_now.name: Transylvania
minting_now.description: Some collections blend Transylvanian traditions with modern art, such as digital art inspired by Romanian painting or traditional, ornate 3D painted eggs (inspired by Romanian tradition).

minting_now.name: CODEX by A | G | M
minting_now.description:
Cycle I · CODEX

A cabinet of quiet cycles. The first cycle, CODEX, is a finite body of 161 plates — folios of armillaries, orreries, and charted skies, each drawn as if copied from a manuscript that was never published.

Every folio is editioned once and sealed in turn. No announcements, no roadmap

minting_now.name: Souls Onchain
minting_now.description: 1111 Beautiful Souls Onchain, All Souls are Handdrawn

minting_now.name: Mysterious Underwater City
minting_now.description: Deep beneath the shimmering surface of the ocean, hidden beyond coral reefs and swirling currents, lies a forgotten city—Nerathis, the Mysterious Underwater City. Shrouded in silence and bioluminescent glow, its towers rise like ancient monuments from the ocean floor, encrusted with pearls, seashell

minting_now.name: pudle
minting_now.description: Pudles is not just a character. It’s an emotion. It’s a mood. It’s a small digital world where softness meets the vibe of Web3 💖

minting_now.name: Muted Frogs
minting_now.description: Muted Frogs. No noise. No hype. Just frogs.

minting_now.name: DECAPINATION
minting_now.description: A 10K Punk-Pop PFP Art Collection forever immortalized on the Ethereum blockchain.

minting_now.name: Low Orbit Solitude
minting_now.description:
Suspended between motion and stillness
warmth and emptiness.
A moment of isolation that isn't loud or tragic
but deeply internal.
Not loneliness exactly
more like choosing distance
and finding a strange weightless calm in it.

minting_now.name: Lil Dickbutts

Keep away from children.

minting_now.name: Harmony NFT
minting_now.description: Sometimes the body tries to heal itself so that the heart and mind can be in harmony. Because harmony is where sanity is found.

minting_now.name: WONDERLAND BAZAAR
minting_now.description: WonderLand It's back to connect with you and take you on a journey through these collections.

minting_now.name: Mutant#2
minting_now.description: is a collection of 10,000 Gang Apes mutated by infection with a space virus. Let's gather together and capture as many Mutant Gang as possible to save the Gang Town.

minting_now.name: Snailin Shroomland
minting_now.description:
Title: "Snailin’ in the Cosmic Shroomland"

Description:

This golden snail be chillin’ under some fat, glowy mushrooms like it owns the galaxy. The grass be poppin’, the sky’s lit with cosmic vibes, and those shooting stars? Straight-up magic.
